office_address: 4455 East Camelback Road, Suite 300, Phoenix, AZ 85018
emergency_definition: complete power outage to the whole home
sparking or burning smell from an outlet or panel
electrical fire or smoke from a panel
non_emergency_routing_rules: Voicemail. We call back same day if it's before 5 PM, or next morning if it comes in after 5 PM.

call_transfer_rules.fail_action: apologize and say we'll call back within 60 minutes

integration_constraints: never create a job for EV charger installs without first confirming the customer has a 200-amp panel
never create a job for panel upgrades without first confirming the property type is not a mobile or manufactured home
after_hours_flow_summary: After-hours non-emergency calls go to voicemail. Emergency calls are routed to on-call electrician, then operations manager, then 24-hour answering service.
office_hours_flow_summary: Calls are answered by agent, who transfers caller to dispatch after 30 seconds for non-emergencies and 20 seconds for emergencies.
special_instructions: always ask if the customer is a repeat client
mention free electrical safety inspection at the end of non-emergency calls
